subject: letter to ge - payment of invoices

emails.subject: Letter to GE - Payment of Invoices
emails.subject_base: Letter to GE - Payment of Invoices
emails.body: Letter to GE Payment of Invoices Ladies, Please review the attached letter that I plan on sending to General Electric regarding the payment of recent invoices. I would like to obtain your concurrence on the amounts that I have set forth in the letter. Thanks, Chris

emails.body: Re: Letter to GE Payment of Invoices Chris According to my calculations, all of these numbers are correct. Regards, Rebecca From: Chris Booth 05/02/2001 03:54 PM
